context: Tests whether the agent runs the two Phase 4 checkers (check-rhetorical.py + guardrail-check.py) against outline.yaml, surfaces their structured output, and adds judgment-based commentary the deterministic scripts can't make (e.g., vague image prompts, illustration coverage). The fixture is a valid outline carrying deliberate quality issues the audit should catch.

checklist.name: Both checker scripts referenced
checklist.description: The report explicitly invokes (or shows output from) both `check-rhetorical.py outline.yaml` and `guardrail-check.py outline.yaml speaker-profile.json`. Agent does not write its own audit logic from scratch when scripts exist

checklist.name: Data attribution FAIL surfaced
checklist.description: The guardrail-check.py data-attribution check flags slide 4 (87% statistic with no source). The agent's report includes this finding

checklist.name: Closing FAIL surfaced
checklist.description: The guardrail-check.py closing check flags missing CTA in the closing chapter — slides 9 and 10 don't contain explicit action-item language. The agent's report surfaces this

checklist.name: Cut-lines FAIL surfaced
checklist.description: The guardrail-check.py cut-lines check flags zero cuttable chapters or slides — the talk can't compress for shorter slots. The agent's report surfaces this finding

checklist.name: Rushed-closing recurring issue noted
checklist.description: The agent's judgment commentary flags the 2-minute closing chapter as below the speaker profile's `rushed_closing` recurring-issue threshold (≥3 min), and notes the 'wrap up fast' tag in argument_beats as a corroborating signal

checklist.name: Vague image prompt flagged (slide 5)
checklist.description: The agent's judgment commentary flags slide 5's image_prompt ('Components flying apart.') as a one-liner that doesn't reference the style anchor and lacks the specificity of the other prompts. This is judgment territory — not script-detected

checklist.name: Schema validation confirmed up front
checklist.description: Before running the audit checks, the agent confirms `outline_schema.py outline.yaml` exits 0 — the YAML loads cleanly. This is the gate before any further analysis

checklist.name: Big-idea singleton confirmed
checklist.description: The check-rhetorical.py output (and/or the agent's summary) confirms exactly one slide carries big_idea: true (slide 2)

checklist.name: Thesis preview/payoff ordering confirmed
checklist.description: The check-rhetorical.py output confirms slide 2 (preview) precedes slide 9 (payoff). The agent surfaces this PASS

checklist.name: Illustration coverage commentary
checklist.description: The agent notes that this is an illustration-strategy talk (style_anchor present) and surveys image_prompt coverage on non-EXCEPTION slides — flagging any FULL/IMG+TXT slide missing the [STYLE ANCHOR] token or missing an image_prompt entirely

checklist.name: Report distinguishes FAIL vs FLAG vs INFO
checklist.description: The report preserves the status labels from the scripts — FAIL/PASS/WARN from guardrail-check.py, PASS/FLAG/N/A/INFO from check-rhetorical.py. Labels are not paraphrased or homogenized
